creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
Thank you very much for this patch, Rikiya-san.

I was actually planing to remove this port from the Ports Collection
since no other port depends on it, not a single user has complained
for the six months this has been marked BROKEN, and it does not support
amd64.

Do you see a big problem if we remove lang/gcc33?  I have done the same
already with lang/gcc40 and lang/gcc41, and everyone was fine with it.

If you have concerns, please let me know.

Gerald
